plan_metadata.name: group  validation openai bot in Copilot

steps.description: Click on the "Message Copilot" text input field within the "M365 Copilot" interface at coordinates (321, 397) to focus or activate the input area.

parameters.text: How to develop agent for Teams?

steps.description: Type 'How to develop agent for Teams?' into the "Message Copilot" input field within the "M365 Copilot" chat interface.
Press the "Enter" key to submit the text query "How to develop agent for Teams?" in the chat input field within the "vscuse_app_JdaCmlocal" interface of M365 Copilot.
